name: GIGABYTE B650M AORUS ELITE AX Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 2x PCIe 4.0 x16 - Support DDR5-6666(OC) - 2x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen 2 Type-C+A - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Realtek 2.5GbE LAN - 802.11ax Wi-Fi 6E - Bluetooth 5.2
shortName: GIGABYTE B650M AORUS ELITE AX Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 2x
description: Micro-ATX motherboard for AMD AM5 with DDR5, dual PCIe 4.0 x16 slots, and Wi-Fi 6E for mid-range Ryzen builds.
